name: capability-orchestrator
description: 能力感知 + 路由引导：实时扫描环境中所有可用 skills、subagents、plugins 和 MCP servers，注入路由策略引导 Claude 自动选择最优执行路径

scripts.test: node --test tests/scan.test.cjs tests/skill-contract.test.cjs tests/route-matcher.test.cjs tests/fuzz.test.cjs tests/stress.test.cjs
scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run test:install && npm run test:idempotent

author: Zhiming Deng
